meaning: n.鞭子,车夫v.鞭打,抽打,突然移动
examples: At his belt he carried a rawhide whip.
He cracked his whip and the horse leapt forward.
He could whip a crowd into hysteria.
Cold fronts whip the Duirinish and Trotternish peninsulas, giving Skye a dank, mysterious personality.
She never got a college education even though she was smart as a whip.
